name: webtalk_dump_data
short_description: Dump the webtalk data model created by calls to webtalk_add_data to standard output.
full_help:
webtalk_dump_data

Description: 
Dump the webtalk data model created by calls to webtalk_add_data to standard output.

Syntax: 
webtalk_dump_data  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
